name: DumbPad
description: A notepad with collaborative editing, fuzzy search, & markdown preview
compose:
name: slashnode-dumbpad
services:
  web:
    image: dumbwareio/dumbpad:1.0.4
    container_name: dumbpad
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      SITE_TITLE: DumbPad
      BASE_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:3000
    volumes:
      - web_data:/app/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8255:3000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-dumbpad_web_data
